overview: A modern, futuristic, premium multi-page website for a Drone Services company. Features a video hero, interactive portfolio with dual filters and detail pages, deep service sections, industry showcase, clickable coverage map, and inquiry form — all styled with a sleek dark theme and Framer Motion animations.
features: Video hero section with drone footage background
6-page site: Home, Industries, Portfolio, Services, About, Contact
Portfolio with dual filters (industry + service type) and detail pages
Interactive map with clickable coverage zones
Deep service sections with features and benefits
Industry showcase with use-cases per industry
Inquiry form with validation and success confirmation
Sticky navigation, smooth scrolling, fully responsive
